parameters.formDescription: Dispatch a task to the Claude runner fleet. Pick a project (or ad-hoc), choose a model, describe the task. The job is dropped on the NAS queue and any idle worker picks it up in a clean checkout and opens a PR for your review.

values.placeholder: What should the agent do? For a project job, describe the change and any acceptance criteria — the worker resolves repo, context and memory automatically.

parameters.completionMessage:
={{ $json.summary }}

Any of the 3 workers will pick it up (polled). Watch /srv/jobs/logs on the NAS or the Claude Runner Fleet dashboard — it'll open a PR for your review.
